_meta.description: Parametric Yovo design system. A unique design is identified by a seed (0..999). The seed decomposes into (layout, theme, variation) via deterministic modulo arithmetic — see src/lib/design.js. Every carousel is 3 slides: hook, resolution, CTA. The CTA slide is the same regardless of seed; only the theme is borrowed.

layouts.name: giant_centered
layouts.desc: Massive text, perfectly centered. Maximum scroll-stop.

layouts.name: giant_left
layouts.desc: Massive text, hard left aligned. Editorial feel.

layouts.name: quote_marks
layouts.desc: Oversized opening quote, text below. Magazine pull-quote.

layouts.name: number_bg
layouts.desc: Giant '01' or seed number in faded background, text overlay.

layouts.name: word_highlight
layouts.desc: One key word painted in accent color, rest in fg.

layouts.name: stacked_offset
layouts.desc: Each line of text is indented progressively (staircase).

layouts.name: all_caps_tight
layouts.desc: All caps, tight letter-spacing, bold weight.

layouts.name: countdown
layouts.desc: Countdown timer aesthetic: 'TODAY ENDS IN --h --m'.

layouts.name: top_text
layouts.desc: Text at the top, lots of breathing room below.

layouts.name: bottom_text
layouts.desc: Text near the bottom, lots of breathing room above.

layouts.name: multi_line
layouts.desc: Each word on its own line, generous line-height.

layouts.name: punctuated
layouts.desc: Aggressive punctuation: 'Stop. Replanning. Start. Moving.'

layouts.name: underlined
layouts.desc: Phrase with thick accent underline beneath key word.

layouts.name: striped_bg
layouts.desc: Background with thin accent stripes/lines, text on top.

layouts.name: badge_corner
layouts.desc: Small accent badge in a corner ('01'/'today'/'now'), text body.

layouts.name: divider_top
layouts.desc: Thick accent bar at the top of canvas, text below.

layouts.name: divider_bottom
layouts.desc: Thick accent bar at the bottom, text above.

layouts.name: asymmetric
layouts.desc: Text aligned to a non-standard pivot (e.g. center-left).

layouts.name: minimal_corner
layouts.desc: Text small in one corner, vast emptiness elsewhere.

layouts.name: split_block
layouts.desc: Canvas split into two color blocks; text spans the seam.

variations.name: light_weight
variations.desc: Headline weight dropped to 500 for an editorial calm.
